title: hypolaena elongata
intro: Hypolaena elongata, commonly known as the Golden Fan Lily or Fan-leaved Fanwort, is a small perennial plant species in the family Restionaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Hypolaena elongata can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments.
